userId.description: Required field - Unique identifier refers to every business that is connected and uses Grow payments solutions.

pageCode.description: Required field - Unique identifier refers for this payment mathod

paymentLinkType.description: Required field -The link is closed for one payment

messageText.description:
Message text sent to user.


Required only in case the parameter "sendingMode" is send.

successUrl.description:
Optional  -An after payment "Thank you" URL. make sure to use HTTPS and not HTTP. Must use an external URL and not localhost. Example: https://mysite.co.il?success=true

Do not include special characters in this field.

customText[thankPageDescription].description: Optional -Description to the thank you page
customText[thankPageDescription].example: נציג יצור קשר בהקדם לקביעת מועד טיפול

invoiceNotifyUrl.description:
optional - Url for invoice

Do not include special characters in this field.

notifyUrl.description:
Optional - A fixed server address can be set via GROW

Do not include special characters in this field.

paymentTypes[0][payments][paymentsPaymen.description:
Required field  - in case the parameter 
paymentTypes[0][payments][paymentsMaxPaymentNum]
 is not sent.
 Determine payments number. 1-12

paymentTypes[0][payments][paymentsMaxPay.description:
Required field  in case the  parameter 
paymentTypes[0][payments][paymentsPaymentNum]
 is not sent.
-Determine payments number must be minimum 2
Restricting the number of payments. the customer can choose between 2- 12

pageFieldSettings[fullName][value].description: Required field -Full name must consist of at least two names.

pageFieldSettings[phone][value].description: Required field -A valid israeli mobile phone numebr Example: 0500000000

pageFieldSettings[invoiceName][isRequire.description:
Optional - specifies whether the customer is required to complete the invoice name field.
If set to true (or 1), the field becomes mandatory.
If set to false (or 0), the field remains optional.

pageFieldSettings[invoiceLicenseNumber][.description:
Optional - specifies whether the customer is required to complete the invoice name field.
If set to true (or 1), the field becomes mandatory.
If set to false (or 0), the field remains optional.

products[data][0][catalogNumber].description: Optional - catalog number of the product

products[data][0][vatType].description:
Required field- 
Specifies the value based on the business VAT status:


if the business is subject to regular VAT setting=  1
if the business is VAT-exempt - VAT setting = 3

transactionType[0].description: specify which payment method to display - Credit Card

transactionType[1].description: specify which payment method to display -bit

transactionType[2].description: specify which payment method to display -Apple Pay

transactionType[3].description: specify which payment method to display - Google Pay

transactionType[4].description: specify which payment method to display - bank transfer

transactionType[5].description: specify which payment method to display - Pay Box

cField1.description:
optional -Custom field, you may add up to 9 fields.

Do not include special characters in this field.

cField2.description:
optional -Custom field, you may add up to 9 fields.

Do not include special characters in this field.

backgroundColor.description:
Optional - Defines the background color of the payment page.

Format:
HEX color code (e.g. #FFFFFF)

buttonColor.description:
Optional - Defines the background color of the payment button.

Format:
HEX color code (e.g. #0285AC)

paymentButtonText.description:
Optional - Sets the text that will appear on the payment button

Validation rules:
Up to 20 characters - only letters

You can also configure a default business logo via the business management interface.

post.description: Each business has its own unique identifiers  (userId + pageCode) - the identifiers on this documentation are for example only. To integrate with the API, please contact Grow support to obtain the necessary permissions and your unique identifiers.
